mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_simcard_info(iccid, data_refresh_time) VALUES
(#{item}, now())

update.foreach: UPDATE t_simcard_info SET msisdn = #{item.msisdn}, iccid = #{item.iccid}, imsi = #{item.imsi}, sp_code = #{item.spCode}, carrier = #{item.carrier}, data_plan = #{item.dataPlan}, data_usage = #{item.dataUsage}, account_status = #{item.accountStatus}, active = #{item.active}, test_used_data_usage = #{item.testUsedDataUsage}, data_balance = #{item.dataBalance}, support_sms = #{item.supportSms}, expiry_date = #{item.expiryDate}, test_valid_date = #{item.testValidDate}, silent_valid_date = #{item.silentValidDate}, active_date = #{item.activeDate}, outbound_date = #{item.outboundDate}, data_refresh_time = now(), flag1 = #{item.flag1}, flag2 = #{item.flag2}, flag3 = #{item.flag3} WHERE imsi = #{item.imsi}
